item.dc:creator: maeta

item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Sunday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
her eyes are messing with me, but i like it. greetings online friends
so.. you looked cooler and that's a problem?
i assume he means live shrews and mice
hey that's my favorite animal, the snow leopard
my dog could not do that, no training at all
how do they know i'm not a farmer?
i love Owen's Wilson
so conceited
T2 is my favorite movie (non-comedy)
had no sound, still enjoyed
we've all done this at least once
i knew it was ok
mmm hmm
time for goblin mode
petting zoos smell
Stevie does this also
yes
that's my time.. have a great night, gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: It's probably too much to ask.
item.description: Front page edit: toss a few bucks to The Trevor Project if you've got the means. https://www.thetrevorproject.org/
item.dc:creator: 5hortBu5

item.title: I thought cigarettes would be the thing that killed me.
item.description: I had no will power to quit. Every attempt failed. I thought it was because I was weak, or the addition was too strong. My doctor offered me a medication to help me quit. I only half heartedly accepted the prescription. The medication worked by making me feel like I had smoked too much and became stronger over time. Slowly, I was smoking less and less. I finally saw an exit for the addiction and took it. I was tired of being a slave to it. I have heard that the medication has since been taken off the market. That motivates me not to have a relapse. (originally posted by @PutItInNeutral on 2023-02-26 22:55:16)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.dc:creator: ExistenceIsPainWasTaken

item.title: Woke
item.dc:creator: kickmyballsrealhard

item.title: Some programming humor for a niche audience
item.description:
1. Yeah, this is real. It is in his Twitter still.
2. What OS are you currently on?
3. Simple as that
4. "Works perfectly, just sucks up all the power of the village (and nearby hydroelectric plant)"
5. Which one is this for your? For me it's the TV. I just need it to be BIG and nice black colors. I hook it up to a PC and the PS4 and that's all I need. Don't need a TV with 100 useless apps.
6
7. Speaking of dumb "smart" shit
8
9. Boy, did they bet on the wrong horse
10
11. Dude I'm tryina work here
12. Some of you are crazy creative with the stuff you come up with, never occurred to my to try that
13
14
15. IT'S HARD, OKAYYY?! Thank you if you made this far in the dump. Let me share with you that as well as posting on Imgur, I'm also working on a game of my own. A passion project, if you will. It's a "Stanley Parable" inspired first person narrative game. If you like the humor of this dump, you might actually like the game to (at least what my friend on Discord tells me, that one friend). Anyway please wishlist it helps small game devs like me: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Have a great Monday
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: I made a post about it my story, and Imgur hates selfies but I’m in recovery for ED and I wanted to share
item.description: I know Imgur despises selfies but I don’t know how else to show this specific thing. I’m starting to feel alive again. I know I look fairly “normal” in the center but I assure you I was not feeling or acting normal at all. On the left was before, center is in the thick of it and on the right I am recovering. I have not restricted for two months. I have a lot more energy than I did and I feel more like how I remember feeling before. My hair seems to be producing scalp oils again and my skin is less dry/flaky. I’ll probably delete this because I know I’ll get downvote and mean comment bombed but on the off chance it doesn’t I’ll leave it up. Edit: ED means eating disorder in this case, not erectile dysfunction
item.dc:creator: personalrandomgirlaccount

item.title: What a fucking bad ass!! Killing those trying to recapture slaves and put them back into slavery!
item.description: This absolute legend deserves to be remembered! https://theafricandreamsl.com/the-incredible-story-of-aunty-polly-the-fearless-black-woman-who-fought-off-white-slavers-to-protect-enslaved-black-fugitives-in-the-mid-1800s/ Extra info about the underground railroad if anyone wants to know, Aunt Polly isn't mentioned here, it's just about the rail road https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Underground_Railroad Edit : the tag for Black history month won't add for some reason, so I apologise to anyone who has it blocked and this appeared on your time line anyway!

item.title: Wasn't expecting my XV post to be politicomedy
item.dc:creator: Rayfire3535

item.title: Cake Day N.o 6
item.description: For my sixth Cake Day I present to you one of my early favorites: internet weirdness by imaginative people. This is what keeps me going in this capitalist hellscape which is our world today. Be free, creative and quirky as you can. Make the world a better place. I hope you all have a good day and more to come. Thank you from the bottom of my heart, Imgurites have helped keep me sane. I've had some tough times, but getting better, except for the knee that I busted last week. *Edit for most viral. Holy fricking cheeseballs! You are awesome. Keep doing good things and being excellent to each other! Do another good thing today and make someone else smile, do it for me please :)
item.dc:creator: PosessedByGost

item.title: If you're against trans people you're wrong. Dead stop.
item.description:
I don't have any trans friends. I'm a cis white male approaching 50. I've had to readjust my thinking on several topics in order to be correct. I love debating but I can only win if I'm more informed than my opponent so I've spent the last several years educating myself on the struggle of the trans community.
It's become incredibly clear to me that 99% of the attacks on the trans community are based in misinformation, bigotry, and fear. If you don't support the trans community, bring on your judgment but you'd better bring your A game and be informed because I will easily eviscerate you if you aren't.
The last debate I had was with a millennial friend and I was stunned at their ignorance. All of their arguments were the exact same points I heard about gay people in the 90's. Now they have more rights and acceptance then any of us could have imagined 30 years ago. I'm so sorry you all have to deal with this. To be a pawn in a political struggle that really has nothing to do with you. I'm not sure how to be the best ally, but please know that I have your back and I'm out there trying my best to change minds. If you are struggling or need some encouragement and support please DM me. I may not be the ideal ally but I do support you 100%. Stay strong. I truly believe history will fall on your side eventually.
item.dc:creator: meme2theextreme

item.title: Karen is gonna Karen ...
item.description: To refresh your memory, Amy Cooper, a dog owner walking in Central Park, called the cops and faked an attack because there was a black man in her vicinity. What was he doing? He was bird-watching. You know, that thing people do when they’re super interested in birding. How nefarious!
item.dc:creator: blank666man

item.title: My Fallout building addiction through the years.
item.description:
Obsessions become obvious in hindsight, when I bought Fallout 4 on its release date back on 2015 I couldn't imagine that I would put thousands of hours into it and still be playing it today.
2015 Sanctuary Hills - First Playthrough, no mods. This mess grew organically.
2016 Nordhagen Beach - Second Playthrough, no mods. Foundations stacked using the stair trick (OGs know...)
2016 Nordhagen Beach - I liked the previous design so I remade it with mods druing my next playthrough.
2017 Croup Manor - Simple modern house, built mostly with SOE.
2017 Red Rocket - First playthrough that I used the RR as a major base, also first and only time that I built a huge functioning factory.
2018 Starlight Drive-in - First survival playthrough, minimal building mods only. Those sanctuary walls were the first items I modded into the game myself.
2018 - Sanctuary Hills - Using my own building mod recreated my IRL house.
2018 Red Rocket - Not the same as the one before, this was the start of modding madness and the end of FPS stability.
2018 Croup Manor - 26 stories, fully furnished, structure built mostly using my own custom mod.
2018 Croup Manor - 22th floor infinity pool (because why not...)
2019 Sanctuary Hills - After losing my mod work because of a damaged SSD I started rebuilding my mod from the ground up, now using custom parts made in Blender. This mansion was the testbed for the mod as it was been rebuilt.
2019 Sanctuary Hills - Side View
2019 Croup Manor - A small detour, while the house I still have on clipboard resurrected, my attempt to remake the original building ended up being impractical.
2019 Nuka World (custom)- Build a model of my High School, lived here while on Nuka World.
2020 Sanctuary Hills - A product of the pandemic, what started as an attempt to rebuild the mansion from the ground up ended up being this 5 pool, 3 kitchens, private bar and club, large movie theater, 18 rooms, 27 bathrooms monstrosity.
2020 Sanctuary Hills - At over 15,000 parts, this house taught me the limits of the engine before it starts rendering errors.
2020 Nordhagen Beach - A remake of one of the houses included in the "Paradise" mod using my rebuilt mod.
2020 Sanctuary Hills - Short Playthrough where I decided to use my original home as main base.
2021 Virtual Beach - Liked the CC island, built this house as a beach house.
2021 Virtual Beach - Aerial view.
2021 Sanctuary Hills - Liked the terrain on the first house to the right of the entrance to SH, built my main home here (never finished the factory in the distance...)
2021 The Glowing Sea (custom) - Copied and modified the beach house.
2021 The Glowing Sea (custom) - I like the feeling of living on this edge of the glowing sea, just outside of rad storm range.
2022 Spectacle Island - Copied the house and started fixing it to match the terrain.
2022 Spectacle Island - Aerial view (uses a modified version of Magnificent Spectacle Island)
2022 Spectacle Island - Wanted to build a huge building, learned that using standard size parts is a recipe for FPS and rendering failure...
2023 Spectacle Island - House design inspired by a Hitman 3 beach house.
2023 Spectacle Island - I built this partially to deal with the frustration of all my failed large building attempts.
2023 Starlight Drive-In - Decided to put effort into my mod and ended making 2x2, 4x4 and 8x8 floors, walls and columns to work as the main building blocks. The result is a 40 story building with an average of 70 FPS with a 3070ti.
2023 Starlight Drive-In - Couldn't resist to out a beach on top.
2023 Starlight Drive-In - For scale purposes.
2023 Nordhagen Beach - Just wanted a new beach house.
2023 Nordhagen Beach - Just your average modern 4 bedroom 9 bathroom home...
2023 Nordhagen Beach - And 2 pools...
2024 Starlight Drive-In - As much as I liked my 40 story beach on top home, I decided to rebuild it inspiring myself on "The Stack" a Canadian building that I caught a glimpse of in a Linus Media Group video. This rebuild is also courtesy of Starfield's complete failure to hold my interest for more than a couple of weeks.
2024 Starlight Drive-In - Institute Lobby on floor 24.
2024 Starlight Drive-In - Still a work in progress, but home to my current playthrough.
item.dc:creator: RyanOrville

item.title: Fable was great
item.dc:creator: BrutusGrimme

item.title: From 95lbs to 135lbs ??
item.description: *I apologize for the selfies* Went from almost losing my life to Lupus where I spent 10 days in the hospital, was told I had three months to live, went through excruciating chemo infusions, and was then incapacitated on the couch unable to walk for two months. (I have now been getting chemo infusions for years and my lupus has been pretty well managed) The picture on the left is me working towards becoming the strongest version of myself and thriving. Minus my knee going septic last July, needing emergency surgery, and losing all the muscle in my right leg. I DIGRESS, still, moving onward and upward.
item.dc:creator: fitwolfny

item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

item.title: Ice-cream Bean
item.description: From Wikipedia: “Inga edulis has been cultivated as a fruit tree for millennia and is widely sold on the local South American marketplace, mainly for the sweet, succulent pulp surrounding the seeds. The white pulp (aril) is consumed raw as a sweet snack, though it is less nutritious than the seeds. Toxic compounds such as trypsin and chymotrypsin inhibitors contained in the seeds of Inga edulis are destroyed through cooking.”
item.dc:creator: DOcelot

item.title: Yeah, this takes me out of the fantasy as well
item.dc:creator: MissySassy

item.title: Talking about my weight loss journey gone wrong.
item.description: So, I had been body shamed for years at work, and by people I knew. I felt bad about my body because I was larger than most women my age I know, people would often make remarks on my size and weight, and would ask me why I gained weight after high school. People would call me thunder thighs, ask if I had children, ask if I was pregnant, etc. I live in Hawaii, so it’s not as if there’s no fat people, albeit a lot of people here are smaller. A lot of people are of Asian descent and I would be constantly compared to East and southeast Asian girls I work with. I don’t know why I in particular would receive these comments but I work with women who are a bit older than me so I am not sure. Everyone at my workplace is constantly dieting and talking about weight so perhaps it’s just natural that I’d be pulled into it. I decided to stop eating snacks, then I started rough calorie counting, and then I decided to start logging my intake into a counting app. It started off pretty normal and went off the deep end. My intake went from a fairly normal deficit to a deficit level that was below the minimum required amount. I became obsessive quickly and I ended up losing 10 lbs a month, and lost over 50 lbs in total. I started having physical and mental issues brought on by restriction. Everyone at work congratulated me and customers who were regulars congratulated me off the bat, but I got the most compliments when my BMI went under 20. The lady who worked next door yelled at me in admiration “girl you’re so skinny now! You look great!”. I got compliments from all of my coworkers. To be honest this is a reoccurring theme, if you are fat people do not care if you’re losing weight in a healthy way as long as you’re losing weight. Whenever I’d express a wish not to discuss my body with them, they’d get offended and tell me I should appreciate their compliments. “I’m just trying to give you a compliment, I’m trying to lose weight too!.” I don’t understand the environment of people who say that their weight loss was never noticed because everyone noticed mine and would comment on it. They would say how huge, chunky and big I was before, how I was beautiful now, that it must feel great not to be overweight anymore, etc. I would be told I looked taller, that I looked like a model now, that I used to be really fat and now I’m pretty. “Wow you lost a lot of weight, that’s a good thing!” “Wow you lost hella weight you look good!” It was a constant positive feedback loop. People would touch my back to feel my weight loss and tell me I’m lucky to have been able to lose weight. When I mentioned to a regular who would repeatedly ask me about my secret that I might stop at the right image, she was confused on why I didn’t want to continue farther. I am in therapy now. I ask people in real life not to discuss my body, because they don’t understand, and they still get offended but it is what it is. My boyfriend pressured me to seek help and I did, but it was hard because the external positive feedback loop was so strong. I’m getting better now, I’ve gained a bit of weight back (less than 10 lbs) and the compliments have stopped. I’m trying to heal my relationship with food, and I am trying to reposition my frame of mind so I take care of myself and don’t shape myself solely for the approval of others. Just thought I’d share because why not.
item.dc:creator: personalrandomgirlaccount

item.title: According to color psychology, blue is the color that is most calming for the mind. It can help slow breathing and heart rate, which can make it a good color for relaxation and meditation. Blue is often found in nature, such as clear skies and calm seas,

item.dc:creator: HaliweNoldi

item.title: The 15th in my language folder
item.description: I love trying to unlock how language works across many tongues and this one was really surprising to me. Some of the commenters said it was because of 8 hours of sleep while others pointed out that 8pm is when "night" typically starts in many languages (like for "Boa Noite" = "Good Night/Evening") Original post here: https://imgur.com/gallery/OCTCYPL
item.dc:creator: duoplicity

item.title: I made a safe place for myself.
item.description:
How it started. I had to start over. New stuff smells better anyway.
Comfy
Small room but i don't need a lot of room.
I need a bigger TV.
Much bigger TV
Fred also wants a bigger TV
I like peanut butter & flight sims. Don't judge me.
Other than wanting a beer and a smoke, everything is somehow ok. I even got a clean bill of health from the Dr. No idea when something horrible will come along so I'm going to enjoy it while it lasts. It's possible to ignore existential dread, right?
item.dc:creator: fititallinyourmouth
